channel.title: JetBrains s.r.o. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by JetBrains s.r.o. (jetbrains).

item.title: CVE-2026-50242 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains Hub before 2026.1.13757, 2025.3.148033, 2025.2.148048, 2025.1.148120, 2024.3.148430, 2024.2.148429 authentication bypass via direct database access leading to administrative access was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-56142 · 9.6 CRITICAL
item.description: In JetBrains Hub before 2026.1.13757, 2025.3.148033, 2025.2.148048, 2025.1.148120, 2024.3.148430, 2024.2.148429 privilege escalation by attaching authentication details to accounts was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-56141 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains Hub before 2026.1.13757, 2025.3.148033, 2025.2.148048, 2025.1.148120, 2024.3.148430, 2024.2.148429 account takeover via predictable restore codes was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-53915 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains GoLand before 2026.1.3 remote code execution was possible via untrusted project configuration

item.title: CVE-2026-49386 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2026.1.13570 improper access control allowed enumeration of restricted issues and articles on Planning Canvas

item.title: CVE-2026-49385 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2026.1.13570 improper access control allowed low-privileged users to modify service accounts

item.title: CVE-2026-49384 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains PyCharm before 2025.3.4 stored XSS in Jupyter notebook Markdown cells was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-49383 · 3.3 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA before 2026.1 xXE in the UI Designer form parser was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-49382 · 4.5 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA before 2026.1 code execution was possible via template injection in the Copyright plugin

item.title: CVE-2026-49381 · 3.4 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1 stored XSS on the SAML login page was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-49380 · 3.1 LOW 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1 open redirect in the SAML plugin was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-49379 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1 credentials could be exposed in thread names

item.title: CVE-2026-49378 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1 credentials parameters were exposed via parameter autocompletion

item.title: CVE-2026-49377 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2025.11.2 exposure of sensitive data via default agent parameters

item.title: CVE-2026-49376 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1 insufficient username validation in the SAML plugin

item.title: CVE-2026-49375 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1, 2025.11.5 reflected XSS was possible on the repository download page

item.title: CVE-2026-49374 · 7.6 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1 improper permission checks exposed build configuration parameters

item.title: CVE-2026-49373 · 7.1 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1 remote code execution was possible via Perforce connection settings

item.title: CVE-2026-49372 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1, 2025.11.5 unauthenticated SSRF via build status was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-49371 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1.1 reflected XSS in the keyword filter was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-49370 · 3.4 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2026.1.13162 information disclosure was possible on fetchApp requests

item.title: CVE-2026-49369 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2026.1.13162 information disclosure was possible on Users and Groups pages

item.title: CVE-2026-49368 · 8.7 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2026.1.13162 stored XSS in project notification templates was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-49367 · 8 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA before 2026.1.1 command execution was possible via the guest user account

item.title: CVE-2026-49366 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA before 2026.1.1 command injection was possible via filename completion

item.title: CVE-2026-44413 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2026.1 2025.11.5 authenticated users could expose server API to unauthorised access

item.title: CVE-2026-41882 · 7.4 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA before 2024.3.7.1, 2025.1.7.1, 2025.2.6.2, 2025.3.4.1, 2026.1.1 reading arbitrary local files was possible via built-in web server

item.title: CVE-2026-41153 · 5.8 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains Junie before 252.549.29 command execution was possible via malicious project file

item.title: CVE-2026-33392 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2025.3.131383 high privileged user can achieve RCE via sandbox bypass

item.title: CVE-2026-32745 · 6.3 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains Datalore before 2026.1 session hijacking was possible due to missing secure attribute for cookie settings

item.title: CVE-2026-32229 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains Hub before 2026.1 possible on sign-in account mismatch with non-SSO auth and 2FA disabled

item.title: CVE-2026-28196 · 2.3 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2025.11.3 disabling versioned settings left a credentials config on disk

item.title: CVE-2026-28195 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2025.11.3 missing authorization allowed project developers to add parameters to build configurations

item.title: CVE-2026-28194 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2025.11.3 open redirect was possible in the React project creation flow

item.title: CVE-2026-28193 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2025.3.121962 apps were able to send requests to the app permissions endpoint

item.title: CVE-2026-25848 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains Hub before 2025.3.119807 authentication bypass allowing administrative actions was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-25847 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains PyCharm before 2025.3.2 a DOM-based XSS on Jupyter viewer page was possible

item.title: CVE-2026-25846 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains YouTrack before 2025.3.119033 access tokens could be exposed in Mailbox logs

item.title: CVE-2025-68269 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA before 2025.3 missing confirmation allowed opening of untrusted remote projects over SSH

item.title: CVE-2025-68268 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2025.11.1 reflected XSS was possible on the storage settings page

item.title: CVE-2025-68267 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2025.11.1 excessive privileges were possible due to storing GitHub personal access token instead of an installation token

item.title: CVE-2025-68166 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2025.11 a DOM-based XSS was possible on the OAuth connections tab

item.title: CVE-2025-68165 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2025.11 reflected XSS was possible on VCS Root setup

item.title: CVE-2025-68164 · 2.7 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2025.11 port enumeration was possible via the Perforce connection test

item.title: CVE-2025-68163 · 3.5 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2025.11 stored XSS was possible on agentpushInstall page

item.title: CVE-2025-68162 · 2.7 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2025.11 maven embedder allowed loading extensions via project configuration

item.title: CVE-2025-67742 · 3.8 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2025.11 path traversal was possible via file upload

item.title: CVE-2025-67741 · 4.8 MEDIUM
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2025.11 stored XSS was possible via session attribute

item.title: CVE-2025-67740 · 2.7 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2025.11 improper access control could expose GitHub App token's metadata

item.title: CVE-2025-67739 · 3.1 LOW
item.description: In JetBrains TeamCity before 2025.11.2 improper repository URL validation could lead to local paths disclosure
